mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BLDCON_MST ( USER_UUID ,ACC_TOKEN ,REF_TOKEN ,ISENS_ID ,EXPRE_TIME ,TOKEN_YN ,LINK_STRT_DTM ,LINK_END_DTM ,REG_DTM ,MOD_DTM )VALUES ( #{userUuid} ,#{accessToken} -- 입력받은 accessToken ,#{refresh_token} -- 입력받은 refresh_token ,#{user_id} -- 입력받은 user_id ,#{expires_in} -- 입력받은 expires_in ,'Y' ,NOW() ,NOW() ,NOW() ,NOW() )ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ACC_TOKEN = VALUES(ACC_TOKEN), REF_TOKEN = VALUES(REF_TOKEN), EXPRE_TIME = VALUES(EXPRE_TIME), MOD_DTM = NOW()

INSERT INTO T_BLDINF_TRAN ( SERIAL, CGM_SEQ, CGM_DTM, INIT_VALUE, UPT_VALUE, TREND_RATE, TREND, ERROR_CODE, USER_UUID ) VALUES
(#{item.serialNumber}, #{item.seqNumber}, DATE_FORMAT( STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(#{item.eventAt}, '+', 1), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ), #{item.initialValue}, #{item.value}, #{item.trendRate}, #{item.trend}, #{item.errorCode}, #{item.userId})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE INIT_VALUE = VALUES(INIT_VALUE), UPT_VALUE = VALUES(UPT_VALUE)
mapper.select: -- 유저 정보 SELECT ACC_TOKEN ,USER_UUID FROM T_BLDCON_MST WHERE USER_UUID = #{id}

SELECT FLOOR(AVG(UPT_VALUE)) AS AVG_UPT , ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE > 180 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS TAR_UPT, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE < 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS TBR_UPT, ROUND((STDDEV_SAMP(UPT_VALUE) / AVG(UPT_VALUE)) * 100, 2) AS CV_UPT FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userId} AND UPT_VALUE > 0 AND CGM_DTM >= CONCAT(#{start}, ' 00:00:00') AND CGM_DTM < DATE_ADD(#{end}, INTERVAL 1 DAY);

WITH RECURSIVE hours AS ( SELECT 0 AS h UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < 23 ), win AS ( SELECT CONCAT(LPAD(h,2,'0'), ':00~', LPAD(h+1,2,'0'), ':00') AS win, -- 예: 08:00~09:00 h AS sort, SUM(CASE WHEN t.UPT_VALUE > 0 AND t.UPT_VALUE < 70 AND HOUR(t.CGM_DTM) = h THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hypo_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN t.UPT_VALUE > 180 AND HOUR(t.CGM_DTM) = h THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hyper_cnt FROM hours LEFT JOIN T_BLDINF_TRAN t ON t.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND t.CGM_DTM >= CONCAT(#{start}, ' 00:00:00') AND t.CGM_DTM < DATE_ADD(#{end}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND t.UPT_VALUE > 0 AND HOUR(t.CGM_DTM) = h GROUP BY h ) SELECT IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(win ORDER BY sort ASC SEPARATOR ' , ') FROM ( SELECT win, sort, hypo_cnt FROM win WHERE hypo_cnt >= 1 ORDER BY hypo_cnt DESC, sort ASC LIMIT 3 ) s1 ), '-') AS Low_Value, IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(win ORDER BY sort ASC SEPARATOR ' , ') FROM ( SELECT win, sort, hyper_cnt FROM win WHERE hyper_cnt >= 1 ORDER BY hyper_cnt DESC, sort ASC LIMIT 3 ) s2 ), '-') AS High_Value;

WITH COMM AS ( SELECT CGM_DTM ,UPT_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userId} AND CAST(CGM_DTM AS DATETIME) BETWEEN CAST(#{start} AS DATETIME) AND CAST(#{end} AS DATETIME) ) SELECT CGM_DTM AS DTM ,UPT_VALUE AS UPT ,(SELECT AVG(UPT_VALUE) FROM COMM) AS AVG_UPT FROM COMM ORDER BY CGM_DTM DESC LIMIT 2

-- 공복식후 혈당 평균
WITH meal AS ( SELECT MAX(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(b.EAT_DATE, b.EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s')) AS meal_ts FROM T_FOOD_TRAN b WHERE b.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(b.EAT_DATE, b.EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') >= #{date} - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(b.EAT_DATE, b.EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') < #{date} ), avg24h AS ( SELECT AVG(a.UPT_VALUE) AS avg_val FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND a.CGM_DTM >= #{date} - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND a.CGM_DTM < #{date} ), fasting AS ( -- 공복혈당: 식사 기록이 있을 때만 직전 1건 SELECT a.UPT_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a CROSS JOIN meal m WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND a.CGM_DTM >= #{date} - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND a.CGM_DTM < #{date} AND m.meal_ts IS NOT NULL AND a.CGM_DTM < m.meal_ts ORDER BY a.CGM_DTM DESC LIMIT 1 ), after2h AS ( -- 식사 2시간 이후: 식사 기록이 있을 때만 해당 구간에서 최신 1건 SELECT a.UPT_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a CROSS JOIN meal m WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND a.CGM_DTM >= #{date} - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND a.CGM_DTM < #{date} AND m.meal_ts IS NOT NULL AND a.CGM_DTM >= m.meal_ts + INTERVAL 2 HOUR ORDER BY a.CGM_DTM DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT meal_ts FROM meal) IS NULL THEN (SELECT avg_val FROM avg24h) -- T_FOOD_TRAN 없으면 평균혈당 ELSE COALESCE((SELECT UPT_VALUE FROM fasting), (SELECT avg_val FROM avg24h)) END AS fastingValue, CASE WHEN (SELECT meal_ts FROM meal) IS NULL THEN (SELECT avg_val FROM avg24h) -- T_FOOD_TRAN 없으면 평균혈당 ELSE COALESCE((SELECT UPT_VALUE FROM after2h), (SELECT avg_val FROM avg24h)) END AS after2hValue;

-- 공복식후 혈당 평균
WITH meal AS ( SELECT MAX(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(b.EAT_DATE, b.EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s')) AS meal_ts FROM T_FOOD_TRAN b WHERE b.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(b.EAT_DATE, b.EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') >= CONCAT(#{start}, ' 00:00:00') AND STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(b.EAT_DATE, b.EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') < DATE_ADD(#{end}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) ), avg24h AS ( SELECT AVG(a.UPT_VALUE) AS avg_val FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND a.UPT_VALUE > 0 AND a.CGM_DTM >= CONCAT(#{start}, ' 00:00:00') AND a.CGM_DTM < DATE_ADD(#{end}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) ), fasting AS ( SELECT a.UPT_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a CROSS JOIN meal m WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND a.UPT_VALUE > 0 AND a.CGM_DTM >= CONCAT(#{start}, ' 00:00:00') AND a.CGM_DTM < DATE_ADD(#{end}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND m.meal_ts IS NOT NULL AND a.CGM_DTM < m.meal_ts ORDER BY a.CGM_DTM DESC LIMIT 1 ), after2h AS ( SELECT a.UPT_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a CROSS JOIN meal m WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND a.CGM_DTM >= CONCAT(#{start}, ' 00:00:00') AND a.CGM_DTM < DATE_ADD(#{end}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND m.meal_ts IS NOT NULL AND a.CGM_DTM >= m.meal_ts + INTERVAL 2 HOUR ORDER BY a.CGM_DTM DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT meal_ts FROM meal) IS NULL THEN (SELECT avg_val FROM avg24h) -- T_FOOD_TRAN 없으면 평균혈당 ELSE COALESCE((SELECT UPT_VALUE FROM fasting), (SELECT avg_val FROM avg24h)) END AS fastingValue, CASE WHEN (SELECT meal_ts FROM meal) IS NULL THEN (SELECT avg_val FROM avg24h) -- T_FOOD_TRAN 없으면 평균혈당 ELSE COALESCE((SELECT UPT_VALUE FROM after2h), (SELECT avg_val FROM avg24h)) END AS after2hValue;

SELECT UPT_VALUE as UPT , CGM_DTM as DTM FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userId} AND CGM_DTM BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{end}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') ORDER BY CGM_DTM ASC

WITH COMM AS ( SELECT * FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userId} AND CGM_DTM BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{end}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') )SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE >= 150 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ,0) AS HIGHT ,COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE >= 70 AND UPT_VALUE < 150 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS NORMAL ,COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE > 54 AND UPT_VALUE < 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS LOW ,COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE <= 54 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS LOWEST FROM COMM

SELECT CONCAT( FLOOR( 100 * SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE BETWEEN 70 AND 180 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) ), '%' ) AS TIR FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userId} AND UPT_VALUE > 0 AND CGM_DTM >= CONCAT(#{start}, ' 00:00:00') AND CGM_DTM < DATE_ADD(#{end}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)

-- 특정 기간 동안의 GMI 계산 SELECT COALESCE(AVG(UPT_VALUE),0) AS AvgBlood ,COALESCE(ROUND(STDDEV_SAMP(UPT_VALUE), 1),0) AS stdBlood ,COALESCE(ROUND((STDDEV_SAMP(UPT_VALUE) / AVG(UPT_VALUE)) * 100, 1),0) AS CV ,COALESCE(ROUND((0.023 * AVG(UPT_VALUE)) + 3.312, 1),0) AS GMI ,(SELECT COALESCE(AVG(a.UPT_VALUE),0) FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND CGM_DTM >= CONCAT(#{start}, ' 00:00:00') AND CGM_DTM < DATE_ADD(#{end}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND TIME(DATE_FORMAT(a.CGM_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) BETWEEN '03:00:00' AND COALESCE( ( SELECT MIN(TIME(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(b.EAT_DATE, b.EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') )) FROM T_FOOD_TRAN b WHERE b.USER_UUID = a.USER_UUID AND CGM_DTM BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{end}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND TIME(DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(b.EAT_DATE, b.EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) BETWEEN '03:00:00' AND '06:00:00') , '06:00:00') ) AS FASTING FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userId} AND CGM_DTM >= CONCAT(#{start}, ' 00:00:00') AND CGM_DTM < DATE_ADD(#{end}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)

WITH FILTERED AS ( SELECT USER_UUID, CGM_DTM, UPT_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userId} AND CGM_DTM BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{end}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND UPT_VALUE > 0 ), AGG AS ( SELECT COALESCE(AVG(UPT_VALUE), 0) AS AvgBlood, COALESCE(ROUND(0.023 * AVG(UPT_VALUE) + 3.312, 1), 0) AS GMI FROM FILTERED ), FILTERED_HH AS ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(CGM_DTM, '%H') AS HourHH, UPT_VALUE FROM FILTERED ), HOURS_ONLY AS ( SELECT HourHH FROM FILTERED_HH WHERE UPT_VALUE <= 70 GROUP BY HourHH ) SELECT A.AvgBlood, A.GMI, COALESCE( (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(H.HourHH, '시') ORDER BY H.HourHH SEPARATOR ', ') FROM HOURS_ONLY H), '-' ) AS MinHours FROM AGG A;

WITH F AS ( SELECT USER_UUID, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(EAT_DATE, EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AS meal_ts, GROUP_CONCAT(FOOD_NAME ORDER BY FOOD_NAME SEPARATOR ', ') AS foods FROM T_FOOD_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userId} AND STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(EAT_DATE, EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') >= STR_TO_DATE(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') GROUP BY USER_UUID, meal_ts ), PRE_WINDOW AS ( SELECT A.USER_UUID, F.meal_ts, F.foods, A.CGM_DTM, A.UPT_VALUE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY A.USER_UUID, F.meal_ts ORDER BY A.UPT_VALUE DESC, A.CGM_DTM ASC ) AS rn FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN A JOIN F ON A.USER_UUID = F.USER_UUID AND A.CGM_DTM >= F.meal_ts - INTERVAL 3 HOUR AND A.CGM_DTM < F.meal_ts WHERE A.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND A.CGM_DTM BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{end}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND A.UPT_VALUE > 0 ), PRE_MAX AS ( SELECT USER_UUID, meal_ts, foods, CGM_DTM AS fasting_at, UPT_VALUE AS fastingValue FROM PRE_WINDOW WHERE rn = 1 ) SELECT F.USER_UUID, DATE_FORMAT(F.meal_ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS mealTs, F.foods, DATE_FORMAT(P.fasting_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS fastingAt, P.fastingValue FROM F LEFT JOIN PRE_MAX P ON P.USER_UUID = F.USER_UUID AND P.meal_ts = F.meal_ts WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY F.meal_ts;

WITH MEALS AS ( SELECT USER_UUID, EAT_DATE, EAT_STIME, FOOD_NAME , FOOD_CNT , STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(EAT_DATE, LPAD(EAT_STIME, 6, '0')), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AS eat_dt FROM T_FOOD_TRAN WHERE user_uuid = #{userId} AND EAT_DATE = REPLACE(LEFT(#{start}, 10), '-', '') ), JOINED AS ( SELECT m.USER_UUID, m.EAT_DATE, m.EAT_STIME, m.FOOD_NAME , m.FOOD_CNT , m.eat_dt, b.CGM_DTM, b.UPT_VALUE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY m.user_uuid, m.EAT_DATE, m.EAT_STIME ORDER BY (b.CGM_DTM IS NULL), b.CGM_DTM ASC ) AS rn FROM MEALS m LEFT JOIN T_BLDINF_TRAN b ON b.user_uuid = m.user_uuid AND b.CGM_DTM >= m.eat_dt + INTERVAL 2 HOUR ) SELECT USER_UUID, EAT_DATE, FOOD_NAME , FOOD_CNT , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(EAT_STIME, 6, '0'), '%H%i%s'), '%H:%i') AS EAT_STIME, CGM_DTM AS CGM_AFTER_2H_NEAREST, UPT_VALUE FROM JOINED WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY eat_dt;

WITH MEALS AS ( SELECT USER_UUID, EAT_DATE, EAT_STIME, FOOD_NAME , FOOD_CNT , STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(EAT_DATE, LPAD(EAT_STIME, 6, '0')), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AS eat_dt FROM T_FOOD_TRAN WHERE user_uuid = #{userId} AND EAT_DATE = REPLACE(LEFT(#{start}, 10), '-', '') ), JOINED AS ( SELECT m.USER_UUID, m.EAT_DATE, m.EAT_STIME, m.FOOD_NAME , m.FOOD_CNT , m.eat_dt, b.CGM_DTM, b.UPT_VALUE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY m.user_uuid, m.EAT_DATE, m.EAT_STIME ORDER BY (b.CGM_DTM IS NULL), b.CGM_DTM ASC ) AS rn FROM MEALS m LEFT JOIN T_BLDINF_TRAN b ON b.user_uuid = m.user_uuid AND b.CGM_DTM >= m.eat_dt + INTERVAL 2 HOUR ) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY UPT_VALUE DESC) AS RN, USER_UUID, EAT_DATE, FOOD_NAME, FOOD_CNT, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(EAT_STIME, 6, '0'), '%H%i%s'), '%H:%i') AS EAT_STIME, CGM_DTM AS CGM_AFTER_2H_NEAREST, UPT_VALUE FROM JOINED WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY UPT_VALUE DESC;

WITH EXERS AS ( SELECT USER_UUID, EXER_DATE, EXER_ETIME, EXER_NAME , TIMESTAMPDIFF( MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(EXER_STIME, 6, '0'), '%H%i%s'), STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(EXER_ETIME, 6, '0'), '%H%i%s') ) AS MINUTES_DIFF , STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(EXER_DATE, LPAD(EXER_ETIME, 6, '0')), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AS EXER_DT FROM T_EXER_TRAN WHERE user_uuid = #{userId} AND EXER_DATE = REPLACE(LEFT(#{start}, 10), '-', '') ), JOINED AS ( SELECT m.USER_UUID, m.EXER_DATE, m.EXER_ETIME, m.EXER_NAME , m.MINUTES_DIFF , m.EXER_DT, b.CGM_DTM, b.UPT_VALUE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY m.user_uuid, m.EXER_DATE, m.EXER_ETIME ORDER BY (b.CGM_DTM IS NULL), b.CGM_DTM ASC ) AS rn FROM EXERS m LEFT JOIN T_BLDINF_TRAN b ON b.user_uuid = m.user_uuid AND b.CGM_DTM >= m.EXER_DT + INTERVAL 15 MINUTE ) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY UPT_VALUE DESC) AS RN, USER_UUID, EXER_DATE, EXER_NAME, MINUTES_DIFF, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(EXER_ETIME, 6, '0'), '%H%i%s'), '%H:%i') AS EXER_STIME, UPT_VALUE FROM JOINED WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY EXER_DT;

WITH EXERS AS ( SELECT USER_UUID, EXER_DATE, EXER_ETIME, EXER_NAME , TIMESTAMPDIFF( MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(EXER_STIME, 6, '0'), '%H%i%s'), STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(EXER_ETIME, 6, '0'), '%H%i%s') ) AS MINUTES_DIFF , STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(EXER_DATE, LPAD(EXER_ETIME, 6, '0')), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AS EXER_DT FROM T_EXER_TRAN WHERE user_uuid = #{userId} AND EXER_DATE = REPLACE(LEFT(#{start}, 10), '-', '') ), JOINED AS ( SELECT m.USER_UUID, m.EXER_DATE, m.EXER_ETIME, m.EXER_NAME , m.MINUTES_DIFF , m.EXER_DT, b.CGM_DTM, b.UPT_VALUE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY m.user_uuid, m.EXER_DATE, m.EXER_ETIME ORDER BY (b.CGM_DTM IS NULL), b.CGM_DTM ASC ) AS rn FROM EXERS m LEFT JOIN T_BLDINF_TRAN b ON b.user_uuid = m.user_uuid AND b.CGM_DTM >= m.EXER_DT + INTERVAL 15 MINUTE ) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY UPT_VALUE DESC) AS RN, USER_UUID, EXER_DATE, EXER_NAME, MINUTES_DIFF, UPT_VALUE FROM JOINED WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY UPT_VALUE DESC;

WITH EXERS AS ( SELECT USER_UUID, EXER_DATE, EXER_STIME, EXER_ETIME, EXER_NAME, TIMESTAMPDIFF( MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(EXER_STIME, 6, '0'), '%H%i%s'), STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(EXER_ETIME, 6, '0'), '%H%i%s') ) AS MINUTES_DIFF, /* 운동 종료 시각 기준 (필요시 EXER_STIME로 교체) */ STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(EXER_DATE, LPAD(EXER_ETIME, 6, '0')), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AS EXER_DT FROM T_EXER_TRAN WHERE user_uuid = #{userId} AND EXER_DATE >= REPLACE(LEFT(#{start}, 10), '-', '') AND EXER_DATE <= REPLACE(LEFT(#{end}, 10), '-', '') ), DELTA AS ( SELECT e.*, /* 15분 전: 가장 최근 값 */ ( SELECT b.UPT_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN b WHERE b.user_uuid = e.user_uuid AND b.CGM_DTM <= e.EXER_DT - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE ORDER BY b.CGM_DTM DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS pre_val, /* 15분 후: 가장 이른 값 */ ( SELECT b.UPT_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN b WHERE b.user_uuid = e.user_uuid AND b.CGM_DTM >= e.EXER_DT + INTERVAL 15 MINUTE ORDER BY b.CGM_DTM ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS post_val FROM EXERS e ), CLEAN AS ( SELECT *, (post_val - pre_val) AS delta_15m, ABS(post_val - pre_val) AS abs_delta_15m FROM DELTA WHERE pre_val IS NOT NULL AND post_val IS NOT NULL ), /* 운동명별 변동폭 최대 1건 선택 */ PICK_ONE_PER_NAME AS ( SELECT c.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.EXER_NAME ORDER BY c.abs_delta_15m DESC) AS per_name_rn FROM CLEAN c ), /* 운동명별 1건만 남김 */ TOP_PER_NAME AS ( SELECT * FROM PICK_ONE_PER_NAME WHERE per_name_rn = 1 ) /* 최종 RN: 전체 정렬 기준으로 1,2,3… */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY abs_delta_15m DESC) AS RN, -- 1,2,3 식으로 부여 USER_UUID, EXER_DATE, EXER_NAME, MINUTES_DIFF, pre_val AS UPT_VALUE_BEFORE_15M, post_val AS UPT_VALUE_AFTER_15M, delta_15m AS DELTA_15M, abs_delta_15m AS ABS_DELTA_15M FROM TOP_PER_NAME ORDER BY abs_delta_15m DESC LIMIT 3;
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(UPT_VALUE), 0), 0) AS AVG_VAL FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE UPT_VALUE > 0 AND USER_UUID = #{userId} AND LEFT(REPLACE(CGM_DTM, '-', ''), 8) = REPLACE(LEFT(#{start}, 10), '-', '')

WITH F AS ( SELECT USER_UUID, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(EAT_DATE, EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AS MEAL_TS, GROUP_CONCAT(FOOD_NAME ORDER BY FOOD_NAME SEPARATOR ', ') AS FOODS FROM T_FOOD_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userId} AND STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(EAT_DATE, EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') >= STR_TO_DATE(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') GROUP BY USER_UUID, MEAL_TS ), CAND AS ( SELECT A.USER_UUID, F.MEAL_TS, F.FOODS, A.CGM_DTM, A.UPT_VALUE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY A.USER_UUID, F.MEAL_TS ORDER BY A.UPT_VALUE ASC, A.CGM_DTM ASC ) AS RN FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN A JOIN F ON F.USER_UUID = A.USER_UUID AND A.CGM_DTM > F.MEAL_TS AND A.CGM_DTM <= F.MEAL_TS + INTERVAL 3 HOUR WHERE A.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND A.CGM_DTM BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{end}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND A.UPT_VALUE > 0 ), PICKED AS ( SELECT USER_UUID, MEAL_TS, FOODS, CGM_DTM AS LOWEST_AT, UPT_VALUE AS LOWEST_VALUE FROM CAND WHERE RN = 1 ) SELECT F.USER_UUID, DATE_FORMAT(F.MEAL_TS, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS MEAL_TS, F.FOODS, DATE_FORMAT(P.LOWEST_AT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS LOWEST_AT, P.LOWEST_VALUE, AVG(P.LOWEST_VALUE) OVER (PARTITION BY F.USER_UUID) AS after2hBlood, COUNT(P.LOWEST_VALUE) OVER (PARTITION BY F.USER_UUID) AS CNT_USED_BY_USER FROM F LEFT JOIN PICKED P ON P.USER_UUID = F.USER_UUID AND P.MEAL_TS = F.MEAL_TS ORDER BY F.MEAL_TS;

WITH X AS ( SELECT USER_UUID, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(EXER_DATE, EXER_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AS start_ts, CASE WHEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(EXER_DATE, EXER_ETIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') < STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(EXER_DATE, EXER_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') THEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(EXER_DATE, EXER_ETIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') + INTERVAL 1 DAY ELSE STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(EXER_DATE, EXER_ETIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') END AS end_adj, GROUP_CONCAT(EXER_NAME ORDER BY EXER_NAME SEPARATOR ', ') AS exer_names FROM T_EXER_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userId} GROUP BY USER_UUID, start_ts, end_adj ), X2 AS ( SELECT USER_UUID, start_ts, end_adj, exer_names, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, start_ts, end_adj) AS duration_min, end_adj + INTERVAL 15 MINUTE AS end_plus15 FROM X ), PRE_WIN AS ( SELECT x.USER_UUID, x.start_ts, x.end_plus15, x.exer_names, x.duration_min, b.CGM_DTM AS pre_at, b.UPT_VALUE AS pre_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY x.USER_UUID, x.start_ts ORDER BY b.CGM_DTM DESC -- 운동 시작 이전 ‘가장 최근’ 1개 ) AS rn FROM X2 x JOIN T_BLDINF_TRAN b ON b.USER_UUID = x.USER_UUID AND b.CGM_DTM <= x.start_ts AND b.UPT_VALUE > 0 AND b.CGM_DTM BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(DATE(#{start}), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(DATE(#{end}), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 DAY) - INTERVAL 1 SECOND ), PRE_ONE AS ( SELECT USER_UUID, start_ts, end_plus15, exer_names, duration_min, pre_at, pre_value FROM PRE_WIN WHERE rn = 1 ), POST_WIN AS ( SELECT x.USER_UUID, x.start_ts, b.CGM_DTM AS post_at, b.UPT_VALUE AS post_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY x.USER_UUID, x.start_ts ORDER BY b.CGM_DTM ASC -- ★ 운동 종료+15분 이후 ‘가장 빠른’ 시각 1개 ) AS rn FROM X2 x JOIN T_BLDINF_TRAN b ON b.USER_UUID = x.USER_UUID AND b.CGM_DTM >= x.end_plus15 AND b.CGM_DTM < x.end_plus15 + INTERVAL 2 HOUR AND b.UPT_VALUE > 0 AND b.CGM_DTM BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(DATE(#{start}), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(DATE(#{end}), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 DAY) - INTERVAL 1 SECOND ), POST_ONE AS ( SELECT USER_UUID, start_ts, post_at, post_value FROM POST_WIN WHERE rn = 1 ) SELECT x.USER_UUID, DATE_FORMAT(x.start_ts, '%Y-%m-%d') AS exerciseDate, DATE_FORMAT(x.start_ts, '%H:%i:%s') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(x.end_adj, '%H:%i:%s') AS endTime, x.exer_names AS exerciseName, x.duration_min AS durationMin, DATE_FORMAT(p.pre_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS preAt, p.pre_value AS preValue, DATE_FORMAT(po.post_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS postAt, po.post_value AS postValue, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, x.end_adj, po.post_at) AS postAfterMin, -- 종료 후 경과 분 CASE WHEN p.pre_value IS NULL OR po.post_value IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE po.post_value - p.pre_value END AS deltaValue FROM X2 x LEFT JOIN PRE_ONE p ON p.USER_UUID = x.USER_UUID AND p.start_ts = x.start_ts LEFT JOIN POST_ONE po ON po.USER_UUID = x.USER_UUID AND po.start_ts = x.start_ts WHERE CASE WHEN p.pre_value IS NULL OR po.post_value IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE po.post_value - p.pre_value END IS NOT NULL ORDER BY deltaValue asc, x.start_ts;

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.UPT_VALUE), 1),0) AS avgBlood FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a JOIN T_FOOD_TRAN b WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND DATE(a.CGM_DTM) BETWEEN DATE(DATE_FORMAT(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) AND DATE(DATE_FORMAT(#{end}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) AND DATE(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(b.EAT_DATE, b.EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s')) BETWEEN DATE(DATE_FORMAT(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))AND DATE(DATE_FORMAT(#{end}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) AND TIME(a.CGM_DTM) BETWEEN TIME(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(b.EAT_DATE, b.EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s')) AND TIME(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(b.EAT_DATE, b.EAT_STIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), INTERVAL 2 HOUR));
SELECT count(*) FROM T_BLDCON_MST WHERE USER_UUID = #{userUuid}
SELECT REF_TOKEN FROM T_BLDCON_MST WHERE USER_UUID = #{userUuid}

SELECT CGM_DTM, CONCAT( IF(DATE_FORMAT(CGM_DTM, '%p') = 'AM', '오전', '오후'), ' ', DATE_FORMAT(CGM_DTM, '%h:%i')) AS formatedDate ,UPT_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userUuid} AND DATE(CGM_DTM) = CURDATE() ORDER BY CGM_DTM DESC LIMIT 2

-- 공복혈당 평균 SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.UPT_VALUE), 1),0) AS avgBlood FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userUuid} AND DATE(a.CGM_DTM) = DATE(DATE_FORMAT(sysdate(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) AND TIME(DATE_FORMAT(a.CGM_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) BETWEEN '03:00:00' AND COALESCE( ( SELECT MIN(TIME(b.EAT_DATE)) FROM T_FOODHIS_TRAN b WHERE b.USER_UUID = a.USER_UUID AND DATE(b.EAT_DATE) = DATE(DATE_FORMAT(sysdate(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) AND TIME(DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) BETWEEN '03:00:00' AND '06:00:00') , '06:00:00' )

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.UPT_VALUE), 1),0) AS avgBlood FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a JOIN T_FOODHIS_TRAN b WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userUuid} AND DATE(a.CGM_DTM) = CURDATE() AND DATE(b.EAT_DATE) = CURDATE() AND TIME(a.CGM_DTM) BETWEEN TIME(b.EAT_DATE) AND TIME(DATE_ADD(b.EAT_DATE, INTERVAL 2 HOUR));
SELECT height, weight, ROUND(weight / ((height / 100) * (height / 100)),1) AS BMI FROM T_USER_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userUuid}
DELETE FROM T_BLDCON_MST WHERE USER_UUID = #{userUuid}

WITH t AS ( SELECT FLOOR(HOUR(CGM_DTM) / 3) AS time_grp, UPT_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE UPT_VALUE > 0 AND USER_UUID = #{userId} AND DATE_FORMAT(CGM_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN LEFT(#{start}, 10) AND LEFT(#{end}, 10) ) SELECT CASE time_grp WHEN 0 THEN '오전12' WHEN 1 THEN '오전3' WHEN 2 THEN '오전6' WHEN 3 THEN '오전9' WHEN 4 THEN '오후12' WHEN 5 THEN '오후3' WHEN 6 THEN '오후6' WHEN 7 THEN '오후9' END AS HOUR_LABEL, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE < 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0) AS LOW_PCT, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE BETWEEN 70 AND 180 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0) AS NORMAL_PCT, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE > 180 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0) AS HIGH_PCT FROM t GROUP BY time_grp ORDER BY time_grp;
